onboarding.description: Enter the remote Git URL (optional for local backup only); the local sync repo is managed automatically.
onboarding.gitMissing: Git not detected. Please install it first.
onboarding.needGit: Please make sure Git is available before saving.
onboarding.sshAiGuide: Copy the prompt below to Codex or Claude Code and let it guide you through the setup.
onboarding.sshHintDescription: If your work computer holds company git credentials, pushing to a personal repo may fail due to credential conflicts. Use an SSH key to link your personal GitHub repo.
onboarding.sshManualStep1Desc: Do not reuse your company key. Generate a new ed25519 key with a passphrase.
onboarding.sshManualStep2Desc: Copy the public key and paste it into GitHub -> Settings -> SSH and GPG keys -> New SSH key.
onboarding.sshManualStep2Title: Add the public key to GitHub
onboarding.sshManualStep3Desc: Add a Host alias for your personal GitHub that forces the new key (IdentitiesOnly yes).
onboarding.sshManualStep4Desc: On Windows, start the OpenSSH Authentication Agent service first. On macOS, use the keychain to remember the passphrase.
onboarding.sshManualStep5Desc: Success returns: Hi <user>! You've successfully authenticated...
onboarding.sshManualStep6Desc: Paste a URL in this form into the Remote Git URL field and click Check Remote.
onboarding.sshPromptCopied: Copied - paste it into Codex / Claude Code
onboarding.title: Initial Setup

dashboard.description: View the sync status of agent skills on this machine.
dashboard.notConfigured: No sync repository configured. Please complete setup first.
dashboard.title: Dashboard

sync.applied: Sync complete: applied {{count}} item(s), backed up {{backups}} item(s).
sync.description: Review all planned changes before syncing.
sync.title: Sync Preview

conflicts.description: Decide the keep direction for each conflicting skill, then run sync.
conflicts.reviewAtSync: Decisions take effect when sync runs.
conflicts.title: Conflict Resolution

settings.ignore: Ignore rules (one per line; matched files are excluded from change comparison)
